title: Pod Trooper
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Pod Trooper''' was a name used by the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] to describe troopers inserted to planetary locations through [[Yorik coral]] pods that contained minimum life support, just enough for the warriors to reach the planet.

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Traitor]]'' {{1st}}

==Sources==
*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
